ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "motto" TEXT /* Motto of the character */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the character (e.g., human, Martian, cylon) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the character */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the character belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "appearance" TEXT /* Physical appearance of the character */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* Special abilities or powers of the character */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the character (e.g., alive, dead, missing) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or birthplace of the character */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* First appearance of the character in the series */,
  "last_appearance" TEXT /* Last appearance of the character in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the author */,
  "born" TEXT /* Birth date of the author */,
  "died" TEXT /* Death date of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards received by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "num_episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes or books in the series */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the series */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the species (e.g., human, Martian, cylon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* Special abilities or characteristics of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_relationships" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "related_character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related character */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, enemy, ally) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., close, distant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_related_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_character_id") REFERENCES characters ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the character */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the character */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_versions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
